summary: Iteration 13 - Enhanced Zone Edit Dialog testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working. BUG FIXED: Save button was not saving zone_code field - now fixed and verified.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Save button was not including zone_code in the update payload
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added zone_code: selectedZone.zone_code to handleUpdateZone call

backend: Can update both name_ar and zone_code together
Zone permanently deleted via DELETE endpoint
Session by ID returns zones with all fields
Sessions by floor ID returns Feb 17 session
frontend: Session loads showing date: جولة الثلاثاء، ١٧ فبراير ٢٠٢٦
Double-click zone opens enhanced edit dialog
Zone Name input (اسم المنطقة) visible and editable (data-testid='zone-edit-name')
Zone Code input (الترميز) visible and editable (data-testid='zone-edit-code')
Zone Status section shows 3 buttons in a row
Active button (نشط) highlighted green when zone is active
Inactive button (غير نشط) highlights amber when clicked
Permanent Delete button (حذف نهائي) visible with red styling
Save button saves both name_ar AND zone_code (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
zone_code change persists after reopening dialog
Style controls section present (fill/stroke color, opacity, width, style)
Copy zone button present in edit mode toolbar
All regression features from iteration 12 working

seed_data_creation: Test zones created/deleted during testing, original data preserved
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested: Enhanced Zone Edit Dialog with editable name_ar and zone_code fields, 3-state zone status buttons (active/inactive/permanent delete). KEY BUG FIXED: Save button was missing zone_code in payload - now fixed at line 1578. Data-testids: zone-edit-name, zone-edit-code, zone-status-active, zone-status-inactive, zone-status-delete, save-zone-changes. Feb 17 session (2026-02-17) has 3 zones. All style controls from iteration 12 still working. DELETE endpoint at /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones/{zone_id} permanently removes zones.

editable_name_ar_field.details: Input field in Zone Edit Dialog shows current zone name, accepts text input

editable_zone_code_field.details: Input field with mono font shows current zone code, accepts text input

zone_status_active_button.details: Shows نشط (Active), highlighted with emerald/green when zone is_removed=false

zone_status_inactive_button.details: Shows غير نشط (Inactive), highlighted amber when zone is_removed=true

zone_status_delete_button.details: Shows حذف نهائي (Permanent Delete), red styling, calls DELETE endpoint

save_button_saves_zone_code.details: Save button now correctly saves name_ar, name_en, zone_code, and daily_note

backend_zone_code_api.details: SessionZoneUpdate model accepts zone_code field, PUT endpoint saves correctly

backend_delete_zone_api.details: DELETE /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/zones/{zone_id} permanently removes zone from session

change_type_badge.details: Dialog header shows change type badge when zone was modified (e.g., 'تم الإزالة' for removed zones)

copy_zone_regression.details: Copy zone button still works in edit mode toolbar

style_controls_regression.details: All style controls (fill/stroke color, opacity, width, style) still working
